data_source: Tiingo Free API with local CSV cache fallback, tiered refresh, 429 circuit breaker, append-only cache updates
update_mode: large universe with coverage-gaps-first hydration: no-cache tickers are downloaded before tier rotation; critical anchors and caches beyond business-day lag limits bypass tier rotation; future-dated caches/provider responses are quarantined; existing historical CSV rows are not overwritten, only new dates are appended
strategy_version: Eason Master US Market Monitor Cloud Sync v5 freshness-contract

refresh_policy.long_tail_weekly: deterministic weekday rotation; no-cache tickers bypass rotation

universe.note: coverage_gaps are tickers without usable cache yet; errors are true processing/fetch failures not classified as rotation/rate-limit coverage gaps.

rule_engine.note: Samples below minimum are reported but should not be used as primary buy evidence.

note: Market-only summary for ChatGPT reading. Decision summary is latest_decision_summary.json.
